architecture.summary: N/A - pure internal refactor of existing living-docs-sync.ts. No architectural changes. Removes dead code, fixes variable reference bug, extracts duplicated logic into helpers.

integrations.summary: N/A - no new integrations. Existing external sync behavior unchanged. gray-matter import consolidation is internal only.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - no UI components. All changes are in backend CLI tooling.

performance.summary: N/A - no performance impact. Static import of gray-matter is equivalent to cached dynamic import. Dead code removal reduces file size.

security.summary: N/A - no security implications. Bug 1 fix (cross-references using validGroups) actually improves correctness by preventing references to filtered-out projects.

edge-cases.summary: Covered by user context. Bug 1: cross-refs to invalid projects. Bug 3: wrong ADR citation. DRY fixes are behavior-preserving extractions. No new edge cases introduced.
